response.overview: Strap in and hold on, as PUT UP OR SHUT UP pits the fastest cars and wildest drivers against each other in a tense battle for ultimate bragging rights. From high-octane drag racing to white-knuckle hill climbs, engines and egos go head to head to win it all. NHRA and Hot Rod Drag Week announcer Brian Lohnes hosts.
response.title: Put Up or Shut Up
